faq_to_confirm_credit_card_information_p: To confirm credit card information Robô MultiPost will hold $2 and release it immediately, you can cancel your subscription anytime from settings without talking to a person
faq_postiz_gitroom_is_proudly_open_sourc: Robô MultiPost is proudly open-source! We believe in an ethical and transparent culture, meaning that Robô MultiPost will live forever. You can check out the entire code or use it for personal projects. To view the open-source repository, click here.
faq_postiz_gitroom_allows_you_to_schedul:
Robô MultiPost allows you to schedule your posts between different channels.
A channel is a publishing platform where you can schedule your posts.
For example, you can schedule your posts on X, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Reddit, Linkedin, Dribbble, Threads and Pinterest.
faq_if_you_have_a_team_with_multiple_mem: If you have a team with multiple members, you can invite them to your workspace to collaborate on your posts and add their personal channels

agent_welcome_message:
Hello, I am your Robô MultiPost agent 🙌🏻.

I can schedule a post or multiple posts to multiple channels and generate pictures and videos.

You can select the channels you want to use from the left menu.

You can see your previous conversations from the right menu.

You can also use me as an MCP Server, check Settings >> Public API

payload_description_line1: Sending a POST request to /posts might feel a bit overwhelming as many platforms have different requirements.
payload_description_line2: We have created an easy way to build your payload to schedule posts.
payload_description_line3: You can use the wizard, and schedule a post with our UI, after you added all your text and settings, the wizard will generate the payload for you.

ai_credits_exhausted: You've reached the generation limit this month. Contact your administrator.
ai_credits_not_configured: AI generation is not available. Contact your administrator.
ai_credits_unlimited_mode_info: Unlimited mode is active. All profiles have unlimited AI credits. To manage credits per profile, set AI_CREDITS_MODE=managed.
ai_provider_description: Configure your AI keys and models
ai_provider_text_desc: LLM model for text generation, used by the Agent.
ai_provider_image_desc: Image generation (GPT-image, Gemini Nano Banana, Flux, etc).
ai_provider_video_desc: Video generation via KieAI (Seedance 2.0, Veo 3.1). Supports text-to-video (T2V) and image-to-video (I2V).
ai_provider_video_audio: Generate audio along with the video
ai_video_no_credential: No video model configured. Go to Settings > AI Provider > Video.
ai_video_prompt_placeholder: ex: drone shot of a beach at sunset, palm trees swaying, golden hour
ai_video_reference_invalid: Invalid URL (must use http:// or https://).
ai_video_enrich_hint: Adds cinematography details (camera, lighting, pacing) using the Text LLM.
ai_video_loading_hint: Generation can take up to 10 minutes.
ai_video_not_configured: Configure your keys at Settings > AI Provider > Video
ai_video_rate_limit: Wait a moment before generating another video.
ai_video_timeout: Generation took too long (>10min). Try again.
ai_video_upstream_error: kie.ai failed to generate the video
ai_provider_web_search_desc: Web search for the agent (Tavily, Firecrawl). Used when the user requests a post from a URL.
ai_provider_apikey_placeholder_set: Leave empty to keep the current key
ai_provider_apikey_hint_set: Key saved. Click Edit to replace.
ai_provider_inherited_desc: This profile uses the workspace default. You can configure a key exclusive to this profile without affecting others.

ai_provider_override_banner: Profile-specific configuration. Does not affect the workspace default.
ai_provider_remove_override_desc: This profile will go back to using the workspace default.

ai_search_deep_extract_hint: Slower, +2x credits — for sites with dynamic content

ai_provider_coming_soon_desc: Configuration for this kind will be available soon. For now, leave the defaults.
ai_provider_footer_hint: Keys are stored encrypted (AES-256-GCM) and never exposed to the frontend. The last test status is visible in the top bar of each card.

persona_restrictions_placeholder: Never mention competitors, never use the word 'cure', etc.

webhook_config_instructions: Paste these values in Meta Developer Portal > Products > Webhooks > Instagram:
webhook_instagram_api_note: Important: if your Meta app uses the "Instagram API with Instagram Login" product (default for apps created after 2024), the webhook is signed with the Instagram App Secret — different from the Facebook App Secret. Fill the Instagram fields above with the values from the Products > Instagram > API setup tab.
meta_product_facebook_desc: Used for Facebook Pages and Instagram OAuth
meta_product_instagram_desc: Used to monitor comments and story replies in Automations
meta_instagram_app_id_placeholder: Instagram API with Instagram Login → Setup tab
meta_instagram_app_secret_placeholder: Instagram API with Instagram Login → Setup tab
meta_instagram_verify_token_placeholder: Any token you paste in Meta Developer Portal
meta_instagram_webhook_instructions: Paste these values in Meta Developer Portal → Instagram product → Webhooks:
meta_instagram_webhook_fields: Subscribe to these fields in Meta Portal: comments, messages, live_comments, message_reactions.
meta_threads_app_id_placeholder: Threads App ID from Meta Developer Portal
meta_threads_app_secret_placeholder: Threads App Secret from Meta Developer Portal
meta_credentials_delete_description: This will remove all Meta credentials (Facebook, Instagram and Threads). The platform will fall back to the environment variables.
meta_credentials_delete_section_descript: This removes the credentials for this section only. The other sections remain intact. If this is the last configured section, the card falls back to environment variables.
callback_url_hint: Paste this URL into the authorized redirect URIs in the provider's dashboard.
callback_urls_hint: Paste these URLs into the authorized redirect URIs in the provider's dashboard.
please_refresh_integration_from_calendar: Please refresh the integration from the calendar
please_refresh_integration: Please refresh the integration from the calendar
auto_plug_post_description: When a post reached a certain number of likes, add another post to it so your followers get a notification about your promotion
post_plug_x-repost-post-users_descriptio: Add accounts to repost your post
post_plug_linkedin-repost-post-users_des: Add accounts to repost your post
post_plug_linkedin-add-comment_title: Add comments by a different account
post_plug_linkedin-add-comment_descripti: Add accounts to comment on your post
post_plug_linkedin-add-comment_field_com: The comment to add to the post
follow_gate_warning_step_2: Opening DM with button (opens messaging window)
follow_gate_warning_step_4: Send the link or invite them to follow
follow_gate_opening_dm_placeholder: Thanks for your interest! Click the button below to get the link.
follow_gate_max_attempts_hint: Prevents infinite loops if the person never follows.
follow_gate_exhausted_placeholder: I couldn't confirm you're following. Please try again later 😉
dm_button_url_hint: Fill both fields to show the button. Leave blank to send text only.
instagram_reel_cover_description: JPEG image, 9:16, up to 8MB. Applied only to Reels (single video). Optional.
